scenario.name: Basic Sipstone UAC
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[field1]@192.168.5.12:6025 SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[pid]SIPpTag01[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] Supported: replaces Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test User-to-User: 00FA080001001056965CFB;encoding=hex Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 1509186683 1 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP4 [local_ip] b=TIAS:64000 t=0 0 a=avf:avc=n prio=n a=csup:avf-v0 m=audio 41532 RTP/AVP 8 101 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15 a=ptime:20

ACK sip:[field1]@192.168.5.12:6025 SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[pid]SIPpTag01[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] Max-Forwards: 70 [routes] Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0

INVITE sip:[field1]@192.168.5.12:6025 SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[pid]SIPpTag01[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 INVITE Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] Supported: replaces Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test User-to-User: 00FA080001001056965CFB;encoding=hex Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 1509186683 2 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP4 192.168.1.14 b=TIAS:576000 t=0 0 a=activetalker:1 m=audio 9 TLS/RTP/AVP 116 9 8 0 110 18 120 a=sendrecv a=ptime:20 a=rtpmap:116 OPUS/48000/2 a=fmtp:116 maxplaybackrate=16000; sprop-maxcapturerate=16000; maxaveragebitrate=20000; stereo=0; sprop-stereo=0; cbr=0; useinbandfec=1; usedtx=0 a=minptime:20 a=maxptime:20 a=rtpmap:9 G722/8000/1 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000/1 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000/1 a=rtpmap:110 G726-32/8000/1 a=rtpmap:18 G729/8000/1 a=rtpmap:120 telephone-event/8000 a=tcap:1 TLS/RTP/SAVP a=acap:1 crypto:1 AES_256_CM_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:8H3XPBj2CTsnAFwd6YWaeBZlErE7Cf1utxzQsDWZGckaAcOyPN0X5eDBcCKHlA== UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP a=acap:2 crypto:2 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:5B0U2dnWVF8vne0IWBAG44bMyenwoaCvOUEdzuHy UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP a=acap:3 crypto:3 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_32 inline:cUnwOPCHAcuELqVDLeXFwzeIRa6H1ndp2DyY75um UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP a=pcfg:1 t=1 a=1 a=pcfg:2 t=1 a=2 a=pcfg:3 t=1 a=3 a=rtcp-mux a=fingerprint:SHA-256 CE:39:2E:3F:69:FF:22:32:02:CD:17:6E:FD:3D:7D:56:49:B6:DA:E5:4E:70:AE:02:DE:AD:B9:BB:09:CE:15:DE

ACK sip:[field1]@192.168.5.12:6025 SIP/2.0 [last_Via:] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[pid]SIPpTag01[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 ACK Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] Max-Forwards: 70 [routes] Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0

BYE [$1] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[pid]SIPpTag01[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> CSeq: 3 BYE [routes] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0
